mapper.select: SELECT id, work_record_id, expense_type, amount, description, expense_time FROM work_record_expense WHERE work_record_id = #{workRecordId} ORDER BY expense_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO work_record_expense (work_record_id, expense_type, amount, description, expense_time) VALUES (#{workRecordId}, #{expenseType}, #{amount}, #{description}, #{expenseTime})
